title: Katya M'Buele
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:9mbuele.jpg]] |name=Katya M'Buele |homeworld=[[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]{{CSWECite|II|297|M'Buele, Katya}} |birth= |death=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] (35 GrS), [[Tirahnn/Legends|Tirahnn]][[Star Wars Annual (1977) 1|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 1]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Brown |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|It's been years, woman! How've you been?!"
"Livin', Solo. Workin'. Laughin'. Nothin' spectacular—but no complaints, either.|Han Solo and Katya M'Buele|}} '''Katya M'Buele''' was a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who was an early flame of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], with whom she served on the crew of a [[Corellian rim-runner]]. M'Buele flew with Solo during the [[Battle of Ylesia]], and the two Corellians were the only two survivors of a doomed smuggling mission to [[Skye]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] the two briefly reunited on [[Tirahnn/Legends|Tirahnn]], only for M'Buele to [[Death/Legends|die]] shortly after at the hands of a [[Smoke Demon|smoke demon]] conjured by [[Kharys]], the [[Magister of Skye|Majestrix of Skye]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Katya and Zeen were real happy, throwing credits around like they were bantha fodder.|Dash Rendar, after the Battle of Ylesia|''[[Rebel Dawn]]''}} Katya M'Buele was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|human]] and a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] who entered into a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] career during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], serving on the crew of a [[Corellian rim-runner]] alongside a young [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. The pair became romantically involved, and once narrowly survived an aborted smuggling mission to the restricted [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Skye]], when they were captured and hunted by the [[Magister of Skye|Majestrix of Skye]], [[Kharys]]—a dangerous [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] who had once been trained by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Out of 20 Corellians who had traveled to Skye, M'Buele and Solo were the only two survivors. However, their relationship eventually ended when Solo left to further pursue his own smuggling career sometime after the two flew together during the [[Battle of Ylesia]].{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/insideronline/97/indexp4.html|series=Aliens in the Empire|text=Part 2: To a Traitor Go the Spoils}} [[File:Kharys3.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Katya M'Buele and Han Solo flee the attacking Kharys on their ill-fated mission to Skye.]] For her participation in the fighting on Ylesia—where an alliance of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces and a smuggler fleet clashed with the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]—M'Buele was one of the few smugglers who actually got paid. M'Buele and fellow smuggler [[Zeen Afit]] celebrated lavishly as a result, and passed the news on to acquaintance [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]]. M'Buele briefly re-entered Solo's life in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], when the two reunited on the planet [[Tirahnn/Legends|Tirahnn]]—by this point, Solo had become entangled in the Rebel Alliance himself. After briefly catching up aboard Solo's ''[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]'', Solo and M'Buele realized that Solo's friend [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] had encountered Kharys, who had hunted Solo since their escape from Skye. Although M'Buele wanted to join her former flame on his search for information that night, she stayed behind on the ''Millennium Falcon'' at his behest. However, the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] proved no safer than the streets of Tirahnn, as M'Buele was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in her bed by a [[Smoke Demon|smoke demon]], a [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] entity summoned by Kharys. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|You know I could never refuse you anything, you handsome lug.|Katya M'Buele to Han Solo|}} Katya M'Buele had [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and brown skin. She had a close relationship with Han Solo, and even though their romance broke off, they still had warm feelings for one another long afterward. M'Buele thought Solo handsome, and remarked that she could not refuse her fellow Corellian anything. ==Behind the scenes== Katya M'Buele first appeared in [[Star Wars Annual (1977) 1|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 1]], written by [[Chris Claremont]] and released in [[1979]]. In the issue, M'Buele was illustrated by [[Mike Vosburg]] and [[Steve Leialoha]]. The character [[Arwen Cohl]] in the [[2001]] [[James Luceno]] novel ''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' was originally named Margrave M'Buele, as a reference to Katya M'Buele.''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Appearances== *''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{Mo}} *[[Star Wars Annual (1977) 1|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 1]] {{Reprint|Star Wars Annual (1977) 1}} {{1st}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Katya M'Buele}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/insideronline/97/indexp4.html|series=Aliens in the Empire|text=Part 2: To a Traitor Go the Spoils}} *{{CSWECite|II|297|M'Buele, Katya}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{DB|character|hansolo|Solo, Han}} *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' *{{InsiderCite|146|Authors of the Expanded Universe|Authors of the Expanded Universe: Chris Claremont}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |pt=Katya M'buele }} {{DEFAULTSORT:M'Buele, Katya}} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]] [[Category:Smugglers]]
